description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Vicenzo Farfalle pasta, featuring a deep blue front with gold and white text and a central image of cooked farfalle pasta with vegetables. The front panel highlights the product as a gluten-free, multicereal pasta with quinoa, and displays the net weight of 500g. The left side of the box provides simple three-step cooking instructions with illustrative icons, while the right side lists nutritional information and ingredients in a clear, organized format. The back of the box is predominantly white with a blue accent, offering a description of the product's heritage and additional branding. The box is sealed and designed for retail display, with all sides featuring branding and product information. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, suitable for placement in grocery stores or urban food markets.
description: A rectangular blue and white Vicenzo Farfalle pasta box with gold accents, product imagery, and detailed labeling on all sides. The packaging is visually striking and designed for retail display.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Vicenzo branding, product name, a photo of the pasta, and key features like gluten-free and quinoa content.
description_view_1: The left side displays cooking instructions in three illustrated steps, with the brand name at the top.
description_view_2: The back is mostly white with a blue accent, featuring a heritage description and additional branding.
description_view_3: The right side presents nutritional information, ingredients, and consumer contact details in a structured layout.
attribute_labeling: Front: Vicenzo logo, Farfalle, gluten free, quinoa, product image, 500g. Left: cooking instructions. Right: nutritional info, ingredients, consumer contact. Back: heritage description, branding.
attribute_product_name: Vicenzo Farfalle Pasta multicereal con Quinoa
